home.intro: This is the Atrium starter shell. Hook your domain pages onto the routes from here.

common.confirmDelete: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

password.needsMixedCase: Password must contain both upper and lower case letters.
password.needsDigit: Password must contain at least one digit.
password.needsSymbol: Password must contain at least one symbol.
password.breached: This password appears in a public breach. Choose a different one.

login.signupCta: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.intro: Sign up with an email and password. We'll send you a link to verify your address.
register.checkEmailBody: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to finish creating your account.
register.signupClosed: Signup is closed. If you've been invited, use your invite link.
register.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists.
register.unknownError: Could not create the account. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.invalid: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

acceptInvite.title: Create your account
acceptInvite.description: Set a password to finish creating your account.
acceptInvite.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
acceptInvite.expiredOrRevoked: This invitation has expired or been revoked.
acceptInvite.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been used.
acceptInvite.missingTokenBody: This link appears to be broken. Please contact the person who invited you.
acceptInvite.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.emailSent: If that address exists, we've sent a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.unknownError: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.

twoFactor.setupIntro: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Bitwarden, Authy, …), then enter the 6-digit code it shows to finish enrollment.
twoFactor.enterFirstCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the app
twoFactor.challengeIntro: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code isn't right. Try the next one from your app.
twoFactor.adminResetConfirm: Reset {{name}}'s 2FA? They'll have to re-enroll on next login.
twoFactor.adminResetSuccess: 2FA reset — user will re-enroll on next login.
twoFactor.pickMethodIntro: Pick how you want to do the second factor. You can add the other method later in your profile.
twoFactor.emailSentIntro: We just emailed you a 6-digit code. It expires in 10 minutes.
twoFactor.emailSendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Try again in a moment.
twoFactor.pickChallengeMethod: Which method would you like to use?
twoFactor.webauthnSetupIntro: Plug in your YubiKey or use your device's passkey (TouchID / Windows Hello). Give it a memorable name so you can recognise it later.
twoFactor.webauthnFailed: Couldn't register the key. Try again.
twoFactor.webauthnChallengeIntro: Press the button on your YubiKey or authorise with your device's biometric.
twoFactor.webauthnWaiting: Waiting for your security key… tap it or authorise with your device.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to view this page.
profile.rolesEmpty: No roles assigned. An admin can grant you roles from the Users tab.
profile.confirmLogoutAll: Sign out of every device, including this one?
profile.twoFactorNeedsOther: Enable the other method first — you can't remove your only 2FA.
profile.deleteAccountIntro: Permanently removes your account. After confirmation, your sign-in is disabled immediately and your data is purged after a grace period.
profile.deleteAccountModalIntro: This is irreversible after the grace period. Re-enter your password to continue.

admin.noVisibleSections: You don't have permission to view any admin sections.

settings.empty: No settings have been registered for this app.

maintenance.title: {{brand}} is offline for maintenance
maintenance.defaultMessage: Atrium is undergoing maintenance. Please check back in a few minutes.

system.title: Maintenance & announcements
system.intro: Maintenance mode shows a friendly page to non-super_admin users; announcement renders as a banner at the top of the app shell.
system.maintenanceModeHelp: Block all routes for non-super_admin users until disabled.
system.maintenanceWarning: Only super_admins keep access while this is on. Make sure at least one super_admin can sign in before saving.
system.announcementEnabledHelp: Render a banner above the app shell for every signed-in user.

authAdmin.title: Authentication & access
authAdmin.intro: Account creation, password policy, second-factor enforcement, and self-service deletion. Changes apply on the next request — no restart needed.
authAdmin.allowSignupHelp: When off, accounts can only be created by invitation. When on, the /register page is reachable and the login page shows a sign-up link.
authAdmin.requireEmailVerificationHelp: New self-serve accounts must click the verification link before they can sign in. Invited users always bypass — clicking the invite is the verification.
authAdmin.signupDefaultRoleHelp: Role assigned to fresh self-serve signups. The built-in 'user' role grants no permissions.
authAdmin.twoFactorIntro: Users holding any of the selected roles must enrol a second factor (authenticator app, email code, or security key) before they can use the app. Empty list disables enforcement.
authAdmin.require2faForRolesHelp: A held role triggers the 2FA enrolment gate. If they wipe their factors mid-session, they're bounced to /2fa on the next request.
authAdmin.idleTimeoutHelp: Log out a session whose tab has been unattended for longer than this. 0 disables; 1800 = 30 minutes. Affects every authenticated request, not just JSON APIs. Capped at 30 days.
authAdmin.passwordMinLengthHelp: Bounded to 6-128. Six is the absolute floor; 128 matches the bcrypt input ceiling.
authAdmin.passwordBreachHelp: Looks the password up in HIBP via k-anonymity range API. Network failures fail open — an HIBP outage won't lock users out.
authAdmin.allowSelfDelete: Allow users to delete their own account
authAdmin.allowSelfDeleteHelp: When off, the /users/me/delete endpoint returns 404 and the profile page hides the delete button.
authAdmin.deleteGraceDaysHelp: Days between soft-delete and irreversible hard-delete. The user's sign-in is disabled immediately; data lingers for this many days.

captcha.title: CAPTCHA
captcha.intro: Bot challenge on the unauthenticated auth endpoints (login, register, forgot password). Provider + site key are public; the secret lives in the CAPTCHA_SECRET env var.
captcha.providerHelp: Off disables the gate entirely. Cloudflare Turnstile and hCaptcha share the same siteverify shape.
captcha.siteKeyHelp: Public identifier the widget sends to the provider's JS. Visible in page source.
captcha.secretHint: Set CAPTCHA_SECRET in the environment for verification to work. Without it, the gate fails open and logs a warning.
captcha.required: Please complete the captcha to continue

branding.title: Branding & theme
branding.intro: Drives the brand name in the app shell, the logo above it, and the Mantine theme — preset + curated overrides. Changes apply on the next page load and are visible to every user.
branding.name: Brand name
branding.nameHelp: Shown in the header and as the browser tab title fallback.
branding.logoUrlHelp: Absolute or app-relative URL. Leave empty to render the brand name only.
branding.presetHelp: Each preset is a Mantine theme baseline. Overrides below merge on top.

emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.subject: Subject
emailTemplates.localeMissing: No translation for this locale yet. Save to create it.
emailTemplates.jinjaHint: Jinja template expressions are rendered at send time. Refer to your host app's documentation for available variables.

emailOutbox.title: Email outbox
emailOutbox.empty: No outbox rows match this filter.
emailOutbox.drainTooltip: Run this row through the same code path the cron worker uses, right now.
emailOutbox.drainDisabledTooltip: Only pending rows can be drained manually.
emailOutbox.drainPending: Send failed — retry queued with exponential backoff.
emailOutbox.drainDead: Send failed — moved to dead-letter (max attempts reached).

reminders.title: Reminder rules
reminders.name: Name
reminders.kindHelp: Free-form classification used by host-app cancellation logic. Optional.
reminders.anchorHelp: Event the offset is measured from. Host apps register valid anchor names; type the code that matches one of them.

users.title: Users
users.confirmDelete: Permanently delete '{{name}}'? Only possible when the account has no related records. This cannot be undone.
users.deleteConflict: User has related records attached — deactivate instead.
users.inviteCreated: Invite created — send this link to the new user.
users.inviteLinkHint: Until email delivery is configured, copy this URL and send it yourself. The link expires on the date above.
users.inviteConflict: An active user or invite already exists for that email.
users.impersonateTooltip: Log in as this user (for support)
users.resetPwTooltip: Email this user a password-reset link
users.resetTOTPTooltip: Clear this user's 2FA — they'll re-enroll next login

roles.title: Roles
roles.name: Name
roles.codeHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Immutable once created.
roles.codeInvalid: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
roles.codeConflict: A role with that code already exists.
roles.systemRoleNoRename: System roles can't be renamed, but their permissions are editable.
roles.confirmDelete: Delete role '{{name}}'? Users holding it will lose it; other role memberships are unaffected.

impersonate.confirm: Log in as {{name}} for testing? You'll be able to return to your own account via the banner at the top.

notifs.title: Notifications
notifs.payloadHint: Raw payload for this notification. Host apps register per-kind rendering; until then this is the fallback view.

tokens.notAllowed: You don't have permission to manage personal access tokens.

create.title: New personal access token
create.name: Name
create.nameHelp: Operator-readable label, e.g. "MCP sidecar" or "Backup script".
create.descriptionHelp: Optional internal notes. Never shown to anyone but you.
create.scopesHelp: Permissions the token is allowed to use. The intersection with your current permissions applies on every request.
create.scopesPlaceholder: Pick the permissions this token can use…
create.expiryHelp: Tokens never expire by default. Operator policy may cap the maximum lifetime.

reveal.title: Copy your new token
reveal.warningTitle: This is the only time the token is shown
reveal.warningBody: Store it in a secret manager now. Once you dismiss this dialog, atrium has no way to retrieve the token again — only the prefix and metadata are kept.

rotate.confirm: Issue a new token to replace "{{name}}"? The old token is revoked immediately.

revoke.title: Revoke token
revoke.confirm: Revoke "{{name}}"? Any client using this token will start getting 401 Unauthorized.
revoke.reasonHelp: Required for the audit trail. Visible to the token's user.

errors.scopeOverreach: One of the picked scopes isn't held by your account.
errors.maxPerUser: You've reached the maximum number of active tokens.
errors.scopeOverreachActor: You can't grant a scope you don't currently hold.
errors.scopeOverreachTarget: Pick roles whose permissions cover every initial scope.
errors.emailTaken: A user with that email already exists.
errors.rotateFailed: Could not rotate the token. Try again.
errors.revokeFailed: Could not revoke the token. Try again.

profile.title: Personal access tokens
profile.intro: Long-lived bearer tokens for scripts, agents, or external systems. Each token's authority is the intersection of its scopes and your current permissions.
profile.empty: You haven't created any tokens yet.
profile.cardIntro: Long-lived bearer tokens for scripts and integrations.

admin.title: Personal access tokens
admin.intro: Cross-user view for incident response. Revoke tokens, audit usage, and provision service accounts.
admin.empty: No tokens match the current filter.
admin.serviceAccountsEmpty: No service accounts have been created yet.
admin.auditEmpty: No audit entries for this token yet.

serviceAccount.title: New service account
serviceAccount.name: Display name
serviceAccount.nameHelp: Human-readable label that shows up alongside tokens and audit entries.
serviceAccount.emailHelp: Used as the unique identifier. Service accounts can never log in with this email.
serviceAccount.rolesHelp: RBAC roles the service account holds. The initial token's scopes must be a subset of the union of these roles' permissions.
serviceAccount.scopesHelp: Scopes the initial token carries. Must be a subset of the roles you picked AND a subset of your own permissions.

translations.title: Translations
translations.intro: Pick which locales the language switcher exposes, and override individual UI strings without a redeploy. Overrides take effect on the next page load.
translations.enabledLocalesHelp: Users can switch between these from the header. The first one is the fallback.
translations.reloadHint: Reload the page to see the new strings.
